Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x5FBE "THEGREATESCAPE-07CB-5FBE" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $07cb dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Great Escape, The (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Copied some init code from $0138 - $0153 to $07CB to allow game to startup properly.
